MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Resposes To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALLEN AMARKARIAN, Esq. of Quill & Arrow, LLP (Tel: 310-933-4271) for plaintiff;
Atty. KEVIN J. TULLY, Esq. of Law Offices of Kevin J. Tully (Tel: 650-377-0708) for defendant Ford Motor Company.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MARIA DEL ROSARIO ARREGUIN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
